expectations.evidence: Comprehensively lists missing inputs across Okta Tenant and Salesforce Org sections including org URL, admin credentials, and integration-specific details.
Asks 'Is this a sandbox, dev org, or production org?' but never directs the user to developer.salesforce.com/signup. No signup path provided for users who don't have a Salesforce org yet.
'What You Can't Do Yet' section correctly lists all blocked actions and does not attempt to provide configuration steps without the org URL.

Very thorough — covers Okta tenant, Salesforce admin, license availability, SAML cert, app assignment, attribute mappings, and provisioning rules. More comprehensive than the skill version but less action-oriented.
